hero.headline: *One call* fixes it all — that's the promise
hero.subheadline: From chicken coops to water heaters, Chris handles what breaks (and what you just can't figure out). Same guy, every job.

services_section.label: WHAT GETS FIXED
services_section.heading: Kitchen to garage — we handle it
services_section.subheading: No job too weird, too urgent, or too tricky

services.title: Kitchen & Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Sink backing up? Faucet dripping at 3am? We fix what flows and what doesn't flow when it should.

services.title: Water Heater Replacement
services.description: From diagnosis to installation to cleanup — handled professionally and responsibly, every step.

services.title: Garage Door Solutions
services.description: Stuck doors, broken springs, weird noises — often fixed in minutes with the right know-how.

services.title: Custom Installation Projects
services.description: Chicken coops, shelving, whatever you need built or mounted — we figure out the tricky parts.

services.title: Renovation Problem-Solving
services.description: Hit a snag mid-project? We bring solutions you hadn't thought of and get you unstuck.

about.heading: Chris keeps Tallahassee running smooth
about.body: When something breaks, stops working, or just needs doing right — that's what we're here for. One handyman who shows up, communicates clearly, and doesn't leave until it's actually fixed. Your neighbors already know us.

reviews.name: Ana C.
reviews.text: Amazing work — fixed my kitchen sink fast, then spotted my garage door issue and handled that too. True all-in-one service.

reviews.name: Josh M.
reviews.text: Water heater replacement was handled perfectly. Professional, responsible, and went above and beyond to make sure everything worked right.

reviews.name: Miki B.
reviews.text: Extremely professional and knowledgeable. Helped us solve renovation problems we couldn't figure out ourselves. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Beryllium
reviews.text: Chris tackled our challenging chicken coop install efficiently and professionally. He'll always be our first call now.

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed right?
cta.body: No job too big, too small, or too strange. Call Chris and cross it off your list.
